summary: Swapped android.json to Dokka GFM-sourced output. Fixed 3 extractor bugs uncovered during validation, updated android-accuracy-validator.py with 2 KNOWN_VALID_REFS for push modules. Drift=0, doc-as-test 70/70, CI gate green.

changes.description: Swapped from regex-based android-extractor.py output to android-dokka-extractor.py output. types=319, interfaces=3, members=1886 (up from 1578 pre-fix). Companion methods flattened into parent types.

3 bug fixes: (1) Added bare 'enum' to DECL_KINDS_RE so AmityError parses as kind=enum not kind=class. (2) Added '## Types' to section parser so sealed subclass entries (AmityPost.Data.TEXT, AmityPost.DataType.IMAGE, etc.) are captured. (3) Flatten Companion object members into parent type (top-level and nested) so TypeName.companionMethod refs (AmityError.from, POST_CREATED.enable, CHAT.enable, etc.) resolve correctly.

Added AmityFcm and AmityBaidu to KNOWN_VALID_REFS (separate Gradle modules :amity-push-fcm / :amity-push-baidu not in :amity-sdk Dokka scope). Also extended import check (kind=unknown_import) to consult KNOWN_VALID_REFS.

notes: 77 validator issues found post-swap. Root causes: (1) AmityError enum parsed as class — fixed in extractor. (2) Sealed subobjects under ## Types not captured — fixed. (3) Companion methods not flattened — fixed at both top-level and nested-type depth. (4) AmityFcm/AmityBaidu in separate push modules — added to KNOWN_VALID_REFS. android-from-dokka.json updated to members=1886 after fixes.
